<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace Pest\Plugins\Parallel\Paratest; use Symfony\Component\Console\Output\ConsoleOutput; final class CleanConsoleOutput extends ConsoleOutput { /** * {@inheritdoc} */ #[\Override] protected function doWrite(string $message, bool $newline): void // @pest-arch-ignore-line { if ($this->isOpeningHeadline($message)) { return; } parent::doWrite($message, $newline); } /** * Removes the opening headline, witch is not needed. */ private function isOpeningHeadline(string $message): bool { return str_contains($message, 'by Sebastian Bergmann and contributors.'); } }
